Aggregated execute batches: completed 4/4.
Batch 1: Implemented batch 1 (T1-T3), verified the cache helper with Vitest, verified repository type safety with `npx tsc --noEmit`, and checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/fix-the-fundamental-cache-20260406-0236/execution_batch_1.json`.
Batch 2: Implemented batch 2 (T4-T5), verified the low-level shot hook and cache utils modules with Vitest, verified repository type safety with `npx tsc --noEmit`, and checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/fix-the-fundamental-cache-20260406-0236/execution_batch_2.json`.
Batch 3: Implemented batch 3 (T6), verified the action-layer, high-level shotCreation hook, and low-level shots hook modules with Vitest, verified repository type safety with `npx tsc --noEmit`, and checkpointed progress to `.megaplan/plans/fix-the-fundamental-cache-20260406-0236/execution_batch_3.json`.
Batch 4: Implemented batch 4 (T7), updated the multi-generation path and cache tests, ran a temporary repro test to confirm the missing-thumbnail/timer-glue bug is fixed and then deleted that repro file, ran the full `src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/` and `src/shared/hooks/shots/` Vitest modules, and verified repository type safety with `npx tsc --noEmit`. All verification passed, and progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/fix-the-fundamental-cache-20260406-0236/execution_batch_4.json`.
deviations: T3 keeps a deprecated optional `createShot` field alongside the new RPC contract as a temporary compatibility shim so the existing multi-generation path and action wiring remain typecheck-clean until the next batch lands.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added the migration for `public.create_shot_with_generations` with the same service-role-aware ownership check pattern as `create_shot_with_image`, `MAX(position)+1` placement, `50`-frame `FOREACH` inserts, `ensure_shot_parent_generation`, and a `jsonb` payload that mirrors the shot list join shape. Empty generation arrays are handled via `COALESCE(p_generation_ids, ARRAY[]::uuid[])` and the return payload falls back to `[]` with `COALESCE(jsonb_agg(...), '[]'::jsonb)`.

Added `upsertShotInCache` to update every cached shot-list variant, remove any stale copy of the same shot id, insert by normalized position, and seed the detail cache. Verified with the full `cacheUtils` test module; undefined caches create a new list entry and undefined `shot.position` values append via a `Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER` fallback while `position = 0` still sorts to the front.

Added `CreateShotWithGenerationsRpcResult` and the nested `shot_generation` item type for the `jsonb` RPC payload shape. Updated `CreateShotWithGenerationsPathInput` with the forthcoming `createShotWithGenerations` contract and kept a deprecated optional `createShot` compatibility shim for this batch so the current path/action code remains typecheck-clean until the next batch rewires callers to the RPC.

Added `useCreateShotWithGenerations` in the low-level `shots/` hook layer. It calls `supabase().rpc('create_shot_with_generations', ...).single()`, treats the returned `data` as the jsonb payload itself, guards on `success`, and invalidates inactive shot-list plus unified-project queries on success. Verified with the full existing `useShotCreation` hook test file and `npx tsc --noEmit`.

Rewrote `createShotWithGenerationsPath` to consume the atomic RPC result instead of creating a partial shot plus serial `insertAutoPositionedShotGeneration` calls. The path now maps RPC rows into `GenerationRow` objects with the same compatibility fields as `mapShotGenerationToRow`, computes shot image stats with the same unique-generation logic as `useShotsQueries`, upserts the fully hydrated shot into cache, enqueues generation invalidation with `includeShots: false`, and triggers background inactive shot refetch without the old `setTimeout` glue. Verified with TypeScript and manual field-by-field cross-check against the mapper/query logic.

Wired `createShotWithGenerationsMutation` through the action layer and high-level `useShotCreation` hook so the multi-generation branch now passes `queryClient`, `selectedProjectId`, `shotName`, `generationIds`, and the new RPC mutation into `createShotWithGenerationsPath`. The low-level shots barrel now exports `useCreateShotWithGenerations`, and the affected action/high-level hook tests were updated to reflect the new contract. Verified with the full action-layer, high-level hook, and low-level hook test files plus `npx tsc --noEmit`.

Updated the multi-generation path test to use the new atomic RPC contract, assert immediate cache hydration with thumbnail-bearing images, assert `includeShots: false`, and assert the old timer hack is gone. Added `upsertShotInCache` coverage for sorted insertion, replacement, and detail-cache writes. Final verification included a temporary repro test that confirmed the original missing-thumbnail/timer-glue failure mode is resolved, then ran the full `src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/` and `src/shared/hooks/shots/` modules plus `npx tsc --noEmit`; all passed. The old compatibility shim on `CreateShotWithGenerationsPathInput` was also removed so the final type surface matches the shipped wiring.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: The `FOREACH` loop iterates over `COALESCE(p_generation_ids, ARRAY[]::uuid[])`, so an empty or null array performs zero inserts but still reaches `ensure_shot_parent_generation`. The return query uses `COALESCE(jsonb_agg(...), '[]'::jsonb)`, so the RPC still returns a valid success payload with an empty `shot_generations` array.

`upsertShotInCache` delegates to `updateAllShotsCaches`, which already creates a list cache entry when none exists. Inside the helper, `oldShots` defaults to `[]`, duplicate ids are removed first, `shot.position = 0` inserts ahead of larger positions, and undefined positions normalize to `Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER` so they append instead of breaking sort order.

`CreateShotWithGenerationsRpcResult` intentionally models the `jsonb` payload returned under Supabase's `data` field after `.rpc(...).single()`; it does not include the outer `{ data, error }` envelope, which stays at the call site. A deprecated optional `createShot` shim remains temporarily because this batch adds the new payload type before the next batch rewires the path and mutation callers.

The new mutation uses the same `.rpc(...).single()` call pattern as `useCreateShotWithImage`, but because this RPC returns `jsonb`, the typed payload is the `data` object itself. The hook now parses `data as CreateShotWithGenerationsRpcResult | null`, checks `success`, and leaves the outer `{ data, error }` envelope at the Supabase client layer.

The rewritten path maps every RPC `shot_generation` into the same downstream-compatible fields that `mapShotGenerationToRow` produces: `id`, `generation_id`, deprecated aliases, `location`, `imageUrl`, `thumbUrl`, `type`, `created_at`, `createdAt`, `starred`, `name`, `based_on`, `params`, `timeline_frame`, `primary_variant_id`, and computed `position`. It also sets `metadata: {}` because the RPC payload does not include metadata, which keeps consumers that expect an object-shaped metadata field from receiving `undefined`.

Yes. `useCreateShotAction` now passes `selectedProjectId`, `shotName`, `generationIds`, `queryClient`, and `createShotWithGenerations: createShotWithGenerationsMutation` into `createShotWithGenerationsPath`, while still preserving `createShotMutation` for the file-upload and empty-shot branches. The updated action-layer test asserts the new prop is present on the multi-generation path call.

Yes. The existing tests for `createShotWithGenerationPath`, `createShotWithFilesPath`, and `createEmptyShotPath` remained in place in `shotCreationPaths.test.ts` and still pass as part of the full `npx vitest run src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/` module run. The broader `src/shared/hooks/shots/` module run also stayed green, which confirms the unaffected paths still behave correctly after the new multi-generation flow landed.
